metadata.title: MP4 Compressor Pricing
metadata.description: MP4 Compressor is free in the MVP. Compress MP4 files locally in your browser with no sign-up and no checkout.

pricing.title: MP4 Compressor Pricing
pricing.description: The MVP is free: no account, no checkout, and no server-side video processing.

items.title: Free
items.description: Compress MP4 files locally in your browser.

items.question: Is MP4 Compressor free?
items.answer: Yes. The MVP is free and does not require sign-up or checkout.
